Description_lang: Initiative is used in Unit Testing, Ask Tiger Lu before changing values

Name_lang: Test Initiative - Not as good as the last one

Description_lang: [DNT] The farmers and cultivators of the Neighborhood are struggling to produce good soil for this seasons crop rotation. Sympathetic to their plight, the Cenarion Circle has recommended reaching out to a small farming village on the outskirts of Zangarmarsh...

[DNT] The Earthen residents of the neighborhood have remarked that the indigenous elementals that roam the outer neighborhood could potentially be good allies if approached carefully. They advise seeking the counsel of Therazane in Deepholm for assistance.

[DNT] The neighborhood is having difficulties keeping their lanterns alight and is in dire need of lighting upgrades. Seek out the Kobolds of the Ringing Deeps and seek their counsel on exterior illumination.

Maintaining a home is hard work! Everyone could sure use a little pick-me-up. That's why we've reached out to the grummles of Kun-Lai, who brew a special beverage called kafa that will put some pep back in your step.

[DNT] The Earthen residents of the neighborhood have remarked that the indigenous elementals that roam the outer neighborhood could potentially be good allies if approached carefully. They advise seeking the counsel of Therazane in Deepholm for assistance.
A blood elf art commune is sheltering in the neighborhood while their home is under attack, and wants to share their artistic prowess with the neighborhood.
The dracthyr have recently rediscovered themselves and chosen their own path in life. Their passion for learning will help inspire neighborhood residents to learn new trade skills.
The mechagnomes of Mechagon are here to assist the neighborhood with technological upgrades.
The Consortium are in the neighborhood helping the locals recover items lost in void storage.
The niffen are in the neighborhood to help out with some pollination issues. Together you can make the neighborhoods flora flourish.
